name: I talked to the insurance adjuster already after my warehouse injury - did I mess up?
description: Maybe; stop talking, get lawyer now.[1]

mainEntity.name: I talked to the insurance adjuster already after my warehouse injury - did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; stop talking, get lawyer now.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly, if you admitted fault or minimized; statements can be used against you.** Recorded calls common.[1] Key factors: don't sign releases; get lawyer to review. Request claim status in writing; correct record if needed. Early talks often lowball.[10]
